title: Creation of `/usr/lib/containers/storage/overlay-images` and  `/usr/lib/containers/storage/overlay-layers` with mod 0700 make buidah fails for non root user
body:
In `common/rpm/containers-common.spec` creating `lib/containers/storage/overlay-images` and `lib/containers/storage/overlay-layers` cause _buildah_ to fail when run in container using non root user: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/5332

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/3ceb1b29d72dbb8fd299b7d2083a052e824f36e9/common/rpm/containers-common.spec#L102-L106

Is there any reason to not create them with mode 755 ?

comments.body:
The dir is no supposed to be used by rootless.

There have been significant config file and packing changes for podman 6 so I do not think this will be a problem going forward.

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/680 https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/795
